name: Pepperoni Pizza Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red and green bell peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together cream cheese, sour cream, oregano, garlic powder, and crushed red pepper.
2. Spread the mixture evenly in a 9-inch or 10-inch quiche dish or pie plate.
3. Spread pizza sauce over the top of the cream cheese mixture.
4. Sprinkle with pepperoni, green onions, and chopped peppers.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
6. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese and bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the mixture is heated through.
7. Serve with green pepper strips, tortilla chips, and crackers.
